title: ferray-stats: add scipy.stats statistical-test functions (ttest, ks_2samp, chi2, pearsonr)
description: Follow-up from #470 (scipy.stats descriptive helpers). Add the statistical-test surface: ttest_1samp, ttest_ind, ks_2samp, chi2_contingency, pearsonr, spearmanr. These need normal/chi2/t-distribution CDFs which ferray doesn't currently have. Either build the CDFs in ferray-stats or pull in libm + a minimal scientific-functions module.
